movies.title: APIs
movies.descriptionTitle: Service that provides a selected list of the 50 highest-grossing films of all time. Our API provides detailed information about each film, including title, release year, director and box office. Whether you're a movie enthusiast, a developer looking for data for your popular app, or simply curious about the highest-grossing movies in history, our API has you covered. Explore the world of cinema with our Movies API!
